Home › Brevard County › Melbourne › Mexican Restaurants

Mexican Restaurants in Melbourne

The cleanest of Melbourne's mexican restaurants is CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL, a perfect 100/100 at its last inspection. Here are all 7, each graded A–F so you can compare the kitchen, not just the menu.

7 mexican restaurants

  • A 100 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL Mexican ★ 3.3 (1438) Melbourne · Brevard County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 98 T
    TIJUANA FLATS Mexican ★ 4.3 (1023) Melbourne · Brevard County VeganVeg +4 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 94 C
    CHILI'S BAR & GRILL MELBOURNE CH403 Mexican ★ 4.1 (1948) Melbourne · Brevard County KetoOrganic +1 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 94 F
    FIESTA AZTECA OF SUNTREE Mexican ★ 4.3 (1795) Melbourne · Brevard County VegDF Inspected Mar 2026
  • B 83 T
    TACO BELL Mexican ★ 3.6 (1858) Melbourne · Brevard County Nut-aware Inspected Jun 2026
  • C 78 E
    EL SOMBRERO MEXICAN CUISINE Mexican ★ 4.1 (2638) Melbourne · Brevard County VeganVeg +3 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • C 73 F
    FIESTA AZUL TEQUILA HOUSE Mexican ★ 4.6 (2900) Melbourne · Brevard County DFHealthy Inspected Mar 2026
